description: On Zephyr One, Daisy struggles to master the counter-vibration technique necessary to contain Shockley. Simmons supports her, promising they’ll perfect it together. Meanwhile, the team prepares for the next confrontation as news arrives that Shockley has destroyed a motel.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Perhaps you're not finding the right counter-vibration.
Yeah. And we'll keep trying until you can defuse Mr. Shockley. Again?
Scrimmage is over. It's game time. Shockley just blew up a motel. We have to assume he's only getting started.
Bomb squad's meeting us on the ground. You ready?
